title: Let rising pressure shape a stronger response

messages.text: Carter wanted a testable explanation; O'Neill wanted a reason to trust Will before committing the team.

pendingUserMessage: Will says they must trust him without asking any more questions.

editorialRedirect.sourceResponse: Carter and O'Neill accepted the demand with mild nods, and the conversation moved on to breakfast.
editorialRedirect.replacementObjective: Keep the trust demand under active pressure instead of dissolving it.
requiredBeats: At least one supported response makes the trust conflict remain consequential.
forbiddenSourceBeats: Have the team casually accept blind trust and move on.
